title: Implement real NHS login and local session contracts
summary: Phase 1 sign-in uplift is a recovery and posture surface only. Real OIDC transactions, callback handling, local session rotation, and logout belong to Phase 2.
whyNonBlockingNow: Phase 1 approves anonymous simulator-backed web intake. Auth is explicitly out of the Red Flag Gate baseline and does not weaken the Phase 1 submit or receipt invariants.

title: Build telephony intake and SMS continuation flows
summary: Phone menus, call sessions, recordings, transcripts, and SMS continuation grants are future-channel work.
whyNonBlockingNow: The Phase 1 baseline is a web intake gate. Later channels must converge into the same canonical promotion law but are not required to approve current web intake.

title: Add authenticated patient home and request claim workflows
summary: Authenticated request ownership, claim redemption, richer status controls, and account home views remain later identity work.
whyNonBlockingNow: Phase 1 already proves minimal tracking and same-shell receipt truth without authenticated ownership claims.

title: Keep optional PDS enrichment behind a later feature seam
summary: Optional PDS enrichment is not used to prove Phase 1 request submission, urgent diversion, or receipt tracking.
whyNonBlockingNow: The gate approves the web intake flow without implying live demographic enrichment or matching authority.

title: Replace simulator notification and provider seams with live evidence
summary: Live notification, GP, pharmacy, and provider onboarding can strengthen proof later but cannot change queued, accepted, delivered, and authoritative outcome meanings.
whyNonBlockingNow: Phase 1 validates contract-faithful simulator behavior and explicitly avoids calling provider acceptance a patient delivery truth.

title: Complete production assurance and operational signoff
summary: Clinical safety, DSPT, live-provider assurance, operational playbooks, and production signoff remain outside the simulator-first Red Flag Gate approval.
whyNonBlockingNow: The current gate is a development baseline signoff. Production approval requires additional live evidence without relaxing Phase 1 invariants.
